description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a full beard and short hair, dressed in a loose-fitting long-sleeve top and straight-legged pants. The top appears to be slightly oversized, with sleeves extending to the wrists and a relaxed fit around the torso. The pants are straight and reach down to the ankles, paired with simple, low-profile shoes. The figure's arms are extended outward at an angle, and the hands are open and relaxed. The facial features are simplified but include a prominent nose, eyes, and a thick beard. The overall build is stocky, with broad shoulders and a sturdy stance, suggesting a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A stocky adult male figure with a beard, wearing a loose long-sleeve top, straight pants, and simple shoes, arms extended outward in a relaxed stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bearded face, broad shoulders, and open hands with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the thickness of the torso, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the broad back, and the relaxed fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the head, beard, and the relaxed arm and leg positions.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and straight-legged pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
